channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ryan Blaney channels 'Macho Man' Randy Savage for Talladega inspiration
item.description: TALLADEGA, Ala. (AP) — His title hopes in danger after an early crash in the opening race of NASCAR's third round of the playoffs, Ryan Blaney looked for some inspiration heading into a critical race at Talladega Superspeedway on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State looks to bounce back from another ‘heart ripping’ loss
item.description: The Spartans saw a fourth-quarter lead disappear for the third time in four games in their 30-25 loss at Utah State on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Johnson, The Mercury News

item.title: Penn State football looks for first win under Terry Smith: Nittany Nation
item.description: (WHTM) - Penn State football is looking for its first win in the Terry Smith era after James Franklin was fired on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, PHL 17

item.title: MLS team pledges 'queer' community support after sponsoring ex-UPenn swimmer Lia Thomas event
item.description: A spokesperson for the Los Angeles Football Club showed support for the LGBTQ community at an event on Thursday where Lia Thomas was honored with an "inspiration" award.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brewers outclassed by Ohtani and big-money Dodgers as rousing season ends with NLCS sweep
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Turned out the National League Championship Series was indeed a mismatch, just as Milwaukee Brewers manager Pat Murphy suggested. But not only in payroll and star power. On the baseball field, too. Where it really matters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Schmaltz scores hat trick in 6-3 Mammoth victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Nick Schmaltz had three goals and an assist Friday night, and his hat trick led the Utah Mammoth to its third straight victory, beating the San Jose Sharks, 6-3. Clayton Keller had a goal and three assists and Liam O'Brien and Michael Carcone also scored for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Freed hostage laments Israeli fans being barred from UK soccer game over concerns of pro-Palestinian protests
item.description: Former Hamas captive Emily Damari called Aston Villa's ban on Maccabi Tel Aviv supporters antisemitic, comparing it to "No Jews allowed" signs at stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers' Brock Purdy out for third straight game; Mac Jones to start against Falcons
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Quarterback Brock Purdy has been officially ruled out of his third straight game for the San Francisco 49ers with a toe injury and Mac Jones will start against the Atlanta Falcons.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: OutKick attends Dodgers-sponsored awards show honoring trans swimmer Lia Thomas: Here's what happened
item.description: Ex-UPenn swimmer Lia Thomas took the stage in Los Angeles Thursday night to accept the “Voice of Inspiration Award" amid an ongoing debate surrounding fairness in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rashee Rice to play first game for Chiefs in more than a year after suspension
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Rashee Rice knows almost to the day how long it's been since he played in a game for the Kansas City Chiefs. Two more days until he does it again.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Where will fans find NBA games on TVs or streaming devices this season? The league has an answer
item.description: Michael Jordan is back in the NBA with NBC, and that network brought the sounds of “Roundball Rock” back as well. Amazon Prime is entering the league after hiring many broadcasters who were with Turner Sports in recent years.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AP Source: Government shutdown may move UConn-Louisville opener from Ramstein Air Base to US
item.description: No. 1 UConn's season opener against No. 20 Louisville that is supposed to be played at Ramstein Air Base in Germany on Nov. 4 is in jeopardy of being moved because of the government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals shock Steelers with Joe Flacco-Ja'Marr Chase connection in thrilling win
item.description: The Cinncinati Bengals, led by a connection of Joe Flacco and Ja'Marr Chase, beat Aaron Rodgers and the Pittsburgh Steelers in thrilling fashion on "Thursday Night Football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mission Hills 4-star QB Troy Huhn decommits from Penn State amid James Franklin firing
item.description: Troy Huhn, a 6-foot-4 quarterback from Mission Hills, has decommitted from Penn State after the firing of Head Coach James Franklin, and has a selection of other highly renowned programs to choose from, including Texas, Ohio State, Michigan, and SDSU.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: USD men's basketball on heels of new season; looks on to conference realignment in 2027
item.description: New faces, a new performance facility, and a brand new zest for the upcoming USD Men's Basketball season. Conference realignment in 2027 on the horizon as well.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Living history: Former WFLA anchor Gayle Sierens looks back on Bucs' legacy
item.description: News Channel 8's Aileen Hnatiuk sits with Sierens as she discusses the good, the bad, the ugly, and all the moments that defined the Bucs' legacy.
item.dc:creator: Will Richardson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: PHOTOS: Angel Reese becomes first pro athlete to walk in Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.description: Angel Reese took her game from the court to the catwalk and made history along the way. The Chicago Sky forward became the first professional athlete to walk in the Victoria’s Secret Fashion Show on Wednesday, joining the brand’s high-profile “Wings Reveal” lineup in New York.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jonathan Toews reaches another milestone in his NHL comeback by recording 1st point since 2023
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Jonathan Toews reached another milestone in his NHL comeback on Monday, recording his first point in nearly 2 1/2 years. “I guess when you put it that way it’s nice to get the monkey off your back,” Toews said after he and the Winnipeg Jets beat the New York Islanders 5-2.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes storm past ASU, 42-10, roll into rivalry game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Devin Dampier only had to throw 12 passes Saturday night, as the Utes rushing attack steamrolled Arizona State Saturday night, 42-10, for its first ever Big 12 Conference victory at home. Devin Dampier ran for 120 yards and three touchdowns as Utah ran over No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 with double overtime win at Arizona
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU came from ten points down in the fourth quarter to remain unbeaten on the year with a thrilling 33-27 win at Arizona Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Inability to get runners on base in Game 5 leads to Cubs' exit from postseason
item.description: *Video above: Cubs fans feeling anticipation of Game 5 of NLDS. MILWAUKEE (AP) — For the only time in their entire NL Division Series, the Cubs failed to score in the first inning during Saturday night's winner-take-all Game 5.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: USU drops shootout at Hawaii, 44-26
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) - Micah Alejado threw three touchdown passes and ran for another score on Saturday night to help Hawaii beat Utah State 44-26 for the Rainbow Warriors' first win over the Aggies since 2010.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL gets shut out at Seattle, still controls playoff destiny
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake had a chance to clinch an MLS playoff spot with a win over Seattle, but RSL could not find the back of the net against the Sounders in a 1-0 loss Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Liberty Flames midfielder's love for soccer stems from Mexican heritage
item.description: LYNCHBURG, Va. (WFXR) -- When it comes to soccer, polls and studies show it's the most popular sport in the Latin American community. For Liberty Flames women's soccer player Gaby Bazan, that love for the sport stems from her Mexican heritage. "Both of my parents grew up with nothing.
item.dc:creator: Jermaine Ferrell, NewsNation
